# Vendored `unreal-rc` prerelease

`unreal-rc-0.5.2-rc.0.tgz` was built from `unreal-rc` commit `5319ffc` on the
`fix/explicit-false-transaction` branch. It preserves explicit `transaction: false` calls as
`generateTransaction: false`.

SHA-512:

```text
d897ca6ccb2689448586c6b6c3c3e4c38b980298b9d62aa218f50fc8f1ce260eb2f82bbc5f310df08afe51744fbd520f4f4b35d49328c8dc1116db14ca2318f7
```

Replace this prerelease with the corresponding published `unreal-rc` version once available.
